headline: Is It Time To Reassess Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) After Regional Bank Sector Repricing?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Fifth Third Bancorp at around US$48.86 is offering good value today, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock is up 3.6% over the past week, down 4.2% over the past month, up 2.4% year to date, and has returned 34.6% over the last year and 41.4% over five years. This provides some useful context before comparing price to underlying value. Recent news coverage has focused on Fifth Third Bancorp's positioning within the broader US banking...
